_doc: Presenter-reel rotation for the Pi orchestrator. Each run advances one entry (counter in .reel_rotation_state) on successful publish. Trios are LIVE registry keywords only (verified ASINs + working DM funnel); no product repeats in consecutive posts. If variant_verified=false the orchestrator falls back to the proven tee_daylight variant so an unverified outfit can never auto-post a bad render — flip to true only after a clean LTX-2 verification render.
